description: Horizontal bar chart of average School Performance Grade scores for North Carolina's eight SBE regions in 2023, sorted highest to lowest. Western leads at 65.6 and Sandhills trails at 57.1.

title.text: Average School Performance Grade score by region, 2023
title.subtitle: Eight SBE regions, one color, sorted by value — position carries the comparison.

usermeta.source: Source: NCDPI sample school data, SY2019–2023. Style-guide demo.
